sections.heading: MQL Support
sections.body: Learn about the MongoDB commands that Atlas Data Federation supports.

sections.heading: Supported Data Formats
sections.body: Learn about the data formats that Atlas Data Federation supports.

sections.heading: User Management Commands
sections.body:
For [usersInfo](manual/reference/command/usersInfo) command, Atlas Data Federation
returns information about one or more users. The `forAllDBs` argument
is not supported.
